top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO Could Be Just the Start of the Mega Listings
top_signals.summary: OpenAI, Anthropic are gearing up for listings later this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Stockholm Index Briefly Halted as New Glitch Hits Nasdaq Nordics
top_signals.summary: Stockholm’s blue-chip share index was disrupted by a technical glitch on Thursday, the second time in less than a month that Nasdaq Inc. has suffered problems with its Nordic benchmarks.
